stemHtml: If you are tuned to 121.500 MHz using 8.33 kHz channel spacing, what adjacent frequencies are available?

options.a: Lower adjacent frequency: 121.495 MHz, Higher adjacent frequency: 121.505 MHz
options.b: Lower adjacent frequency: 121.450 MHz, Higher adjacent frequency: 121.550 MHz
options.c: Lower adjacent frequency: 121.485 MHz, Higher adjacent frequency: 121.515 MHz
options.d: Lower adjacent frequency: 121.475 MHz, Higher adjacent frequency: 121.525 MHz
